revision.comment: Created page with "{{Navbox |style = width:auto |listclass = hlist |belowclass = hlist |name = Months |title = Months and days of the year |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |above = '''Today:''' {{Lunisolar Today Long}} {{purge|[refresh]}} * ({{SOLAR TERM TODAY}}) * [[{{Current Sexagenary English}}]] ({{Current Sexagenary}})・{{Twenty-Eight Mansions Today}}・{{DAYOFWEEK}} | name = Japanese Lunisolar Calendar | title = {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|12=simple|13=User:Im..."
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23468259453|time triggered pipeline]]
Bot: consolidate 2 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24945162515|manual triggered pipeline]]
